spec.name: The Dark Pit
spec.description: You are standing by the edge of a dark pit that leads down into even deeper darkness. >BWWAAADDRR< - The smell from down there is unbearable. The sewer stretches into the darkness to the east.

east.description: East. The sewer leads into the sewer junction.

down.description: The Dark Pit leads down and down and down... well you can't see the bottom anyway. There are bars that could function as a ladder on the side.
